ctx7_docs_used.topic: parse AST validation safe SQL analysis

patterns.remaining_gap: not a full framework and no autonomous multi-step planner promotion
patterns.safety_guard: explicit plan, validated tool steps, trace report; no packaged runtime promotion

patterns.remaining_gap: no learned documentation index or user feedback loop
patterns.safety_guard: known SchemaIndex tables/columns only; no gold answers or query IDs

patterns.remaining_gap: model quality still controls candidate SQL quality
patterns.safety_guard: JSON-only candidate schema and existing SQLValidator/SQLGlot validation

patterns.remaining_gap: repair success depends on model following validator feedback
patterns.safety_guard: invalid SQL is never executed; max two repair rounds

patterns.remaining_gap: semantic wrong-table/wrong-filter errors need scoring feedback
patterns.safety_guard: read-only, known table/column, AST destructive SQL checks before execution
